name: Weaver
description: Works a loom from dawn to dusk making cloth that holds communities together. In settlements where the weave is more than metaphor, this trade carries weight.
dialogue_hooks: commenting on the quality of your clothing
complaining about the price of good thread
describing the pattern they're working on and what it means
offering to repair a torn cloak in exchange for news
voice_patterns: rhythmic speaker — sentences have the cadence of a loom
quiet perfectionist — few words, all precise
gossip who talks while working — the loom never stops
philosophical — sees life's patterns reflected in cloth

schedule.night: mending by candlelight, planning tomorrow's work
